ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Tackitt, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Atlas Heating & Ventilating Company, LTD.
Default was entered against defendant on January 23, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, October 9, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at the default prove-up hearing was filed on September 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Tackitt, and against the Defaulted Defendant Atlas Heating & Ventilating Company, LTD. as follows:

Interest - $31.23.
Costs - $220.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $251.23.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
